description:
The quiz assesses practical CSS knowledge, testing familiarity with modern styling techniques and the ability to articulate CSS expertise on a résumé. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, using a light‑hearted, encouraging tone to motivate learners.
Topics: Modern CSS features, Responsive design, CSS selectors and specificity, Layout methods (Flexbox, Grid), Best practices for résumé presentation
Audience: Early‑career developers, front‑end engineers, and students looking to validate and showcase their CSS skills.
